TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Ku'ang sang go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 60.34 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.4 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.18 km²), 3,845 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,392 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,704 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 44%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ku'ang sang go ays psgayun 7 ru 6 alang. 6 alang hani ga, Parupu , Takofan , Himoti , Ciwcia , Cu ki ngo , Cipurungan .
S.PHON: kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, parupu , tako*an , ħimoti , ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia , ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo , ʦ~ʨipuruŋan .
S.FORM: Ku'ang sang go mki sku Taitung. su'unun kwara glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 60.34 km² (rhyan rinpang glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 5.4 km², rr'an hyan glabang lingay 'kiyan ga 1.18 km²), 3,845 hi ku su'unun kwara alang hi kya, 1,392 buwan ku kwarakya, tiku sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga 1,704 hi, kyala kwara pinspung s'uli ga 44%. kwara sahuy na alang Gyencumin ga Taywang Gyencumin na Amis ku smrrhu ku pyux s'uli taya kya. sinpngan sehu s'uli sku sahuy go. ays ptyaw sebu Ku'ang sang go ays psgayun 7 ru 6 alang. 6 alang hani ga, Parupu , Takofan , Himoti , Ciwcia , Cu ki ngo , Cipurungan .
S.PHON: kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo mki s~ɕku taituŋ. s~ɕuʔunun kwara ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa **.** km* (rħjan rinpaŋ ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.* km*, rrʔan ħjan ɣlaβaŋ liŋaj ʔkijan ɣa *.** km*), *,*** ħi ku s~ɕuʔunun kwara alaŋ ħi kja, *,*** βuwan ku kwarakja, tiku s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *,*** ħi, kjala kwara pins~ɕpuŋ s~ɕʔuli ɣa **%. kwara s~ɕaħuj na alaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa tajwaŋ ɣjenʦ~ʨumin na amis~ɕ ku s~ɕmrrħu ku pjux s~ɕʔuli taja kja. s~ɕinpŋan s~ɕeħu s~ɕʔuli s~ɕku s~ɕaħuj ɣo. ajs~ɕ ptjaw s~ɕeβu kuʔaŋ s~ɕaŋ ɣo ajs~ɕ ps~ɕɣajun * ru * alaŋ. * alaŋ ħani ɣa, parupu , tako*an , ħimoti , ʦ~ʨiwʦ~ʨia , ʦ~ʨu ki ŋo , ʦ~ʨipuruŋan .
